2239120.name: Kingdom of Atham: Ethereal Wing DLC
2239120.description:
Champions of Atham, your fantasy realm is about to witness a dazzling transformation with the new "Wing DLC" for Kingdom of Atham: Crown of the Champions! Enhance your presence with a stunning collection of 60 different wings, each offering a unique style and a vibrant palette of colours.

From the mysterious allure of evil wings to the fiery blaze of infernal feathers, and the mesmerizing hues of multicoloured wings, there's a pair to match every champion's essence. Dive into the immersive world of Atham with these enchanting wings that set you apart!

Specifics of the Package:
6 different styles, each with 10 dazzling colours to choose from (Red, Green, Blood, Purple, Blue, Black, Gold, Dark Purple, Light Blue, Rainbow).

Information:
This package is designed to receive updates and additional content throughout the lifetime of Kingdom of Atham: Crown of the Champions.

Important Note:
These wings, while adding an extraordinary flair to your appearance, do not grant the ability to fly. So, let your style soar as you journey through the Kingdom of Atham!
2239120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
